q: In a circular motion, the object moves in a circle.
In rotational motion, the object rotates about an axis.
The motion of the tip of a blade of a fan is a circular motion.
A rigid body is a body that does not deform or change shape.
Angular velocity is the rate of change of angular displacement with respect to time.
The SI unit for angular displacement is the degree.
An object can have an angular acceleration even if its angular speed is constant.
The tangential acceleration is related to the change in the magnitude of the velocity.
All points on a rotating rigid body have the same linear velocity.
The centripetal acceleration is directed towards the center of the circular path.
